problem.title: Merge k sorted arrays
problem.description: Merge k sorted arrays into a single sorted array efficiently.
assumptions: Use a min-heap for O(N log k) where N = total elements.

example.explanation: Use min-heap of size k: push first element of each array, then repeatedly extract min and push next.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Min Heap [✓ Interviewer Accepted]
solutions.description: Push the first element of each array into a min-heap along with its array and element indices. Repeatedly extract the minimum, append it to the result, and push the next element from that same array. This ensures we always pick the globally smallest remaining element in O(log k) time, yielding O(n log k) overall where n is the total number of elements.
